name: jsmap
description: Explore JavaScript codebases without reading whole files: API listings, call graphs, callers, and function extraction.

interface.shortDescription: Explore JavaScript without reading whole files
interface.longDescription: List APIs, map call graphs, find callers, and extract functions from JavaScript codebases.
defaultPrompt: Map the call graph of this JavaScript codebase.
Show me the API of this JavaScript file.
Find every caller of this JavaScript function.
